name: IHC H-Score Analysis
description: Calculate an Area-based H-Score for the Red channel of the 'Fluorescent Cells' sample image. The H-Score quantifies staining intensity using three tiers: Low Positive (1+) for intensity 20-99, Medium Positive (2+) for intensity 100-179, and High Positive (3+) for intensity 180-255. Pixels below 20 are considered background/noise. Use the formula: H-Score = (1 * %Low) + (2 * %Medium) + (3 * %High), where %Tier is the percentage of the total stained area (all pixels >= 20) occupied by that tier. Save a CSV report to '~/ImageJ_Data/results/h_score_report.csv' with columns: Tier, Area, Percentage, and Score_Contribution.
